data.content: Approved implementation review. Verified Thinking Detail defaults to off in both terminal and conversation history views. Codex command_execution item.started now normalizes to assistant tool_use so action rows remain visible when detail is hidden, terminal filtering suppresses raw [executing] blocks and follow-on tool output, and regression tests cover both paths. Sanity gates in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-d486: bun run lint passed with warnings only, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed.
